evidence.title: Engagement scope with Shujaat: involvement tiers, follow-ups, next call

proposed_emails.to_shujaat:
Subject: Exploring an AI & Careers mini‑series (with PM focus)

Hi Shujaat — Building on your weekly cadence and our conversation, we’d love to co‑develop a short, high‑signal series that cuts through hype and shows real cases. Happy to share a 1‑pager; curious which angle feels most valuable to your audience first.
proposed_emails.to_logan_vrijen:
Subject: Shujaat collaboration — two options to pilot

Quick recap: (1) AI & Careers myth‑busting series with PM cases; (2) Base‑athleticism toolkit for early PMs. Let’s decide which to ship first and define success metrics before we meet again.
